title: Notice of Kiewiet Crescent closure in Louis Fourie Road
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Access into Kiewiet Crescent...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Access into Kiewiet Crescent from Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction from 1 September to 17 September (weather permitting).","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Access into Kiewiet Crescent from Louis Fourie Road will be closed for reconstruction from 1 September to 17 September (weather permitting)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Alternative access to Boland Park will be provided via Park Crescent as shown.","html":"Alternative access to Boland Park will be provided via Park Crescent as shown."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience during construction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive carefully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe. For you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Traffic control via Park Crescent intersection.","html":"Traffic control via Park Crescent intersection."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
